message:
fix(engine): correct 3 logic bugs found via deep code investigation

1. contextual_policy_selector: ForceStrategy override reported
   feasible_count=0 even when the forced strategy existed in the
   strategy list. Now correctly reports feasible_count=1 when the
   strategy is found.

2. governance_hooks: generate_compliance_bundle used unwrap_or(0)
   for zero-control division, giving 0% satisfaction. execute_hook
   used 1_000_000 (100%) for the same case. Unified to vacuous-truth
   semantics (zero controls = 100% satisfaction) via unwrap_or(1_000_000).
   Also fixed hash collision risk in build_event by adding length
   prefixes to variable-length strings in canonical preimage.

3. hostcall_batch_transport: SharedRegion batch payload validation
   checked region existence and sealed state but did not validate
   that offset+length stays within the region's occupied_bytes.
   Added bounds check to prevent out-of-bounds region access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
